exemplar.title: How is current knowledge shaped by its historical development?

detailedExemplarData.title: How is current knowledge shaped by its historical development?

strengths: Three specific, real-world objects are clearly identified with appropriate images.
Explicit links are made between each object and the IA prompt on historical development shaping knowledge.
Justifications for each object show an understanding of cumulative progress across disciplines.
Most points are supported by evidence (dates, inventor names) and visual comparisons.
weaknesses: Explanations remain largely descriptive with limited use of TOK terminology (e.g., paradigm shifts, reliability).
Justifications are repetitive in structure and lack depth in analysing collective versus personal knowledge.
Some claims (e.g., âmodern table holds more informationâ) are under-specified and not fully evidenced.
References and citations are inconsistently formatted and incomplete in places.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The official examinerâs total of 8 sits firmly in the 7â8 band. The student meets the descriptors by clearly identifying three objects, situating them in specific contexts, and explaining their links to the prompt. There is strong justification and good visual evidence. However, the work falls short of the 9â10 band due to its descriptive focus, insufficient depth in critical analysis and TOK terminology, and some repetitiveness. Awarding an 8 accurately reflects the submissionâs solid strengths while acknowledging areas for deeper analytical development.

annotations.comment: The statement that the modern table holds more information is valid but needs specificity; reference particular properties (atomic number, electron configuration) to support this claim.

The prompt is accurately stated, but the student could strengthen the introduction by explicitly linking its wording to TOK concepts such as âparadigm shiftâ or âevidence reliabilityâ to anchor the analysis.
Identification of the Hubble Space Telescope as the first space-based observatory is clear and grounds the exhibition in a concrete real-world object.

The description of the telescopeâs launch date and duration is informative but lacks depth on its historical development; include context on the planning and scientific motivations pre-1990 to deepen analysis.
The use of a personal anecdote shows engagement, but the analysis should focus more on collective knowledge outcomes rather than individual fascination.
Including the image of the telescope grounds the exhibition visually and reinforces the link to a specific real-world object.
The transitional sentence promising explanation of context is helpful, but the subsequent analysis remains descriptive; the student should deepen justification using TOK terminology.
The heading introduces the object clearly, but the student could add a thesis linking all three objects to the prompt to improve coherence.
Phrases like âthousands of years agoâ are too broad; citing specific historical figures or moments (e.g. Copernicus, Galileo) would provide precision to the context.
The comparison of original and modern periodic tables visually illustrates historical progression very effectively.
The caption for the modern table lacks detail; the student should specify what new information (electron configurations, isotopes) enhances our current knowledge.
Mentioning Mendeleevâs discovery is useful, but the student should explain how the periodic gaps he predicted demonstrate cumulative growth of chemical knowledge.
Using a personal experience shows engagement, but linking how other chemists relied on this table for experimental predictions would strengthen the collective knowledge discussion.
The header for this section is clear but adding the date â1869â for Mendeleevâs table would ground the timeline for the prompt more precisely.
The link between historical development and current knowledge is clearly stated and shows an understanding of cumulative progress in science.
The summary sentence restates the point without new insight; consider analyzing how interpretive frameworks (classification systems) evolved in tandem with the table.
Adding labels or annotations to the periodic table images would direct attention to specific differences, enhancing clarity in demonstrating historical change.
The calculator section title is clear; providing lineage from mechanical devices through early electronic calculators would contextualize its historical significance.
Describing personal use of the TI-Nspire is engaging, but the student should explain how advanced calculators influenced collective mathematical research or pedagogy.
The explanation of how calculators have evolved to solve complex problems is valid but would benefit from specific historical milestones (e.g., introduction of graphing calculators in 1985).
The assertion linking this calculator to both personal and collective knowledge is well-made, highlighting its dual role in the exhibition.
Works Cited heading lacks consistent formatting; adopting a single style guide (e.g., MLA or APA) would enhance academic rigour.
The citation for the interactive periodic table misses a URL and access date; ensure complete references to demonstrate reliability of sources.
The Mendeleev citation lacks publisher and date details; the student should verify these to strengthen source credibility.
Combining NASA and web-based citations in one entry reduces clarity; separate and standardize each reference for precision.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
